candidates: N/A (gateway infrastructure, not a migration candidate)
deps_py_file_inventory.not_a_candidate_note: deps.py is gateway infrastructure, not a migration candidate — it is activated by app.py lifespan, not ported independently

app_py_file_inventory.note: CAND-018 is the gateway main path file; both GSIC-003 and GSIC-004 modifications live here

langgraph_runtime_implementation_contrac.type: asynccontextmanager — used with `async with langgraph_runtime(app): yield`

enter_sequence.error_if_missing: RuntimeError('langgraph_runtime() requires app.state.config to be initialized')

enter_sequence.note: Must run BEFORE checkpointer so postgres auto-create DB happens first

enter_sequence.action: Initialize SQL repositories OR memory fallbacks
enter_sequence.code: sf = get_session_factory(); if sf is not None: RunRepository(sf), FeedbackRepository(sf); else: MemoryRunStore(), feedback_repo=None
enter_sequence.memory_fallback: MemoryRunStore() — upstream already exists at runtime/runs/store/memory.py

enter_sequence.action: Create run event store (config-driven backend selection)

langgraph_runtime_implementation_contrac.async_exit_stack_pattern: Uses AsyncExitStack to manage multiple async context managers with unified entry/exit
langgraph_runtime_implementation_contrac.null_check_pattern: config = getattr(app.state, 'config', None); if config is None: raise RuntimeError(...)
langgraph_runtime_implementation_contrac.config_initialized_by: app.py before lifespan runs — likely from AppConfig.get_app_config()

app_state_initialization_contract.all_attributes_503_if_missing: Every getter (_require) raises HTTPException(503) if attr is None
app_state_initialization_contract.get_store_returns_none: get_store() returns None if not configured (not a 503)

prerequisites: init_engine_from_config() must have been called (session_factory must exist)
get_local_provider_contract.error_if_prerequisites_not_met: RuntimeError('get_local_provider() called before init_engine_from_config(); cannot access users table')
get_local_provider_contract.user_isolation_note: LocalAuthProvider.get_user(user_id) returns User | None — user filtering happens at repository level

get_current_user_from_request_contract.returns: User (full user object, not just user_id)
get_current_user_from_request_contract.raises: HTTPException 401 if not authenticated or token invalid

skip_conditions: get_local_provider() raises RuntimeError → skip (auth not ready)
get_session_factory() returns None → skip (memory backend or not initialized)
admin_count == 0 → skip admin check, just log first boot message
first_boot_flow: 2. if admin_count == 0: log first boot message, return
3. Operator must visit /setup to create first admin
subsequent_boot_flow: 5. Migrates LangGraph threads with no user_id to admin
ensure_admin_user_startup_contract.orphan_migration_note: Covers 'no-auth → with-auth' upgrade path; non-fatal if migration fails

chain_order: 3. AuthMiddleware (custom, Sub-Bundle C) — innermost, most specific

cors_middleware.not_gsic: CORSMiddleware is FastAPI built-in, not blocking

csrf_middleware.not_gsic: Part of Sub-Bundle C, not blocking

auth_middleware.public_paths: _is_public() returns True for /health, /docs, /openapi.json, and 5 auth routes
auth_middleware.fail_closed: 401 for non-public paths without valid cookie/JWT

lifespan_hook_plan.signature: async def lifespan(app: FastAPI) -> AsyncGenerator[None, None]:

startup_sequence.purpose: First boot check + orphan thread migration
startup_sequence.can_skip: RuntimeError if auth not ready (caught and logged)

startup_sequence.purpose: Initialize all persistence and LangGraph runtime

app_include_router_auth_plan.note: app.include_router(auth.router) is GSIC-004; this section plans the code but DOES NOT register routes in this phase
app_include_router_auth_plan.already_in_app_py: Yes — already imported at top of app.py

GW-START-01.name: Persistence engine initialized before middleware
GW-START-01.verification: init_engine_from_config() called in lifespan startup BEFORE any HTTP request handled
GW-START-01.implementation_note: langgraph_runtime() is entered before any request is processed; init_engine is step 3 of enter_sequence

GW-START-02.name: Memory backend fallback when session_factory is None
GW-START-02.verification: deps.py handles sf=None: MemoryRunStore(), feedback_repo=None, JsonlRunEventStore()
GW-START-02.code_pattern: sf = get_session_factory(); if sf is not None: ... else: MemoryRunStore(), feedback_repo=None

GW-START-03.name: Admin bootstrap graceful when auth not ready
GW-START-03.verification: _ensure_admin_user catches RuntimeError from get_local_provider() and logs warning
GW-START-03.code_pattern: try: provider = get_local_provider() except RuntimeError: logger.warning(...); return

GW-START-04.name: Middleware chain order correct
GW-START-04.correct_order: add_middleware called in order: CORSMiddleware (first), CSRFMiddleware (second), AuthMiddleware (third) — last added = innermost

GW-START-05.name: AuthMiddleware public path bypass works
GW-START-05.verification: _is_public() returns True for defined public paths

GW-START-06.name: get_local_provider() raises if session_factory is None
GW-START-06.verification: RuntimeError raised when calling get_local_provider() before init_engine_from_config()
GW-START-06.code_pattern: sf = get_session_factory(); if sf is None: raise RuntimeError('get_local_provider() called before init_engine_from_config()...')

RR-01.name: All 9 auth routes have unique method+path

RR-03.name: Public routes do NOT require authentication

RR-04.name: Rate limiting on login/register
RR-04.implementation_note: _check_rate_limit() uses in-memory dict; per-process, not distributed

RR-05.name: No route registration outside app.py
RR-05.verification: routers/auth.py defines router but does NOT call app.include_router or app.add_api_route
RR-05.routers_auth_location: router = APIRouter(...) — definition only, registration happens in app.py

MAINLINE_GATEWAY_ACTIVATION.check_location: app.py lifespan — if false, skip lifespan hooks
MAINLINE_GATEWAY_ACTIVATION.implementation_pattern: if os.getenv('MAINLINE_GATEWAY_ACTIVATION', 'false').lower() != 'true': return immediately from lifespan
MAINLINE_GATEWAY_ACTIVATION.effect_when_false: app starts but lifespan hooks don't run — no persistence init, no auth

AUTH_ROUTES_ENABLED.effect_when_false: Auth routes return 404, auth middleware still active

AUTH_MIDDLEWARE_ENABLED.risk_level: HIGH — not recommended to disable in production

DATABASE_BACKEND.effect_when_memory: init_engine returns early; get_session_factory() returns None; MemoryRunStore, JsonlRunEventStore used
DATABASE_BACKEND.rollback_use_case: Set to 'memory' if DB initialization fails at startup

if_lifespan_must_rollback: Set lifespan=None or remove lifespan parameter
Result: App starts without persistence initialization
if_router_must_rollback: Result: Auth routes 404, middleware still enforces 401
if_langgraph_runtime_must_rollback: Remove async with langgraph_runtime(app): from lifespan
Result: No persistence initialization, no RunManager
if_entire_gateway_must_rollback: Revert app.py to pre-gateway state (remove all GSIC-003/004 modifications)
Result: No auth, no persistence, no routes registered

explicit_stop_conditions.action: Do not activate gateway — langgraph_runtime requires session_factory from engine.py

prerequisites: R241-22F (this phase) — gateway deps + app plan completed
SURFACE-010 unblocked — all CV-ISO, MEM-LEAK, POOL, SDB gates passed
Auth Sub-Bundle C complete — user_context, authz, internal_auth, auth_middleware all implemented
Persistence Stage 3+4 complete — engine.py, UserRow, RunRepository, FeedbackRepository, DbRunEventStore, JsonlRunEventStore all implemented
MAINLINE_GATEWAY_ACTIVATION env var available as feature flag
AUTH_ROUTES_ENABLED and AUTH_MIDDLEWARE_ENABLED env vars available as feature flags
